heroBody: After three decades of research and activism, I'm seeking partners for high-impact projects that can help communities build sustainable, just, and resilient futures.

whoShouldReach.heading: Researchers & Academics
whoShouldReach.body: Joint research · Co-authored publications · PhD supervision · Research networks

whoShouldReach.heading: Policy Makers
whoShouldReach.body: Policy consultation · Strategic advice · Evidence reviews · Briefings

whoShouldReach.heading: Journalists & Media
whoShouldReach.body: Expert interviews · Op-eds · Podcast appearances · Documentary input

whoShouldReach.heading: Activists & Communities
whoShouldReach.body: Action research · Workshops · Strategic support · Knowledge sharing

currentInterests.heading: Housing Justice
currentInterests.body: Community-led housing, mutual home ownership, alternatives to extractive landlordism.

currentInterests.heading: Climate Action
currentInterests.body: Grassroots climate mobilisation, just transitions, community-scale net zero.

currentInterests.heading: Urban Futures
currentInterests.body: 15-minute neighbourhoods, car-free cities, reimagining urban space.

currentInterests.heading: Global Solidarity
currentInterests.body: International connections particularly Africa, Asia and South America.
